title: Grant System
description: Government funding is available for road construction to the volcano rim. Players can earn grant money by paving roads, quarrying rock, and clearing paths. Grants provide supplemental income for frontier expansion activities.
definition-of-done: Grant contracts are available for road construction. Completing contract objectives earns money. Multiple grant types with different requirements.
testing-plan: Verify grant contracts appear. Test contract completion and payment. Verify different grant types function correctly.
